## Checklist
- [ ] `npm test` passes locally (e2e + identity suites)
- [ ] Agent-facing changes stay token-cheap (short tools, terse replies)
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies that need a native build
- [ ] Docs updated (`README.md` / `AGENTS.md`) if behavior changed
- [ ] This PR targets `main` via a feature branch (direct pushes to `main` are blocked)
